# Ember 1.2.2

Ember 1.2.2 is a UI patch release that adds a binary overview surface to the renderer.

## Highlights

- Added a Binary Overview modal that opens automatically when a binary is loaded and is reachable any time from the new toolbar `overview` button.
- The overview shows the file path, format/arch/endian, entry, image base, and function/import counts in a single header strip.
- A proportional address-space ribbon visualises every mapped section, colour-coded by kind (code, ro, data, link), with hover detail and click-to-seek.
- A sortable Sections table (by address, size, or name) lists vaddr, end, size, flags, and a kind chip per section; clicking a row jumps the hex/code view to that address.
- Display-base controls (RVA / Image / custom) now live in the overview footer, freeing toolbar space.
- Entrypoint and main are surfaced as quick anchors that navigate directly to the resolved function when one exists.

## Notes

- Packaged releases currently publish Linux and Windows artifacts. macOS remains covered by CI build checks but is not packaged by the release workflow yet.
